name: html-ui-mcp-server
description: MCP server that generates and modifies HTML UI using natural language instructions with AI. Uses Gemini's streaming API internally for faster generation. Includes HTTP streaming endpoint for progressive rendering.
author: FluidMCP

endpoints.description: Stream HTML generation chunks for progressive rendering

tools.name: modify_ui_or_html
tools.description: Generate or modify HTML UI using natural language instructions. Uses Gemini streaming internally for faster generation. Creates modern, responsive UIs with inline CSS.

features: Fast HTML generation using Gemini streaming API
HTTP streaming endpoint with Server-Sent Events (SSE)
Plain HTML with inline CSS (no frameworks)
